text: Being here, enveloped in the geometry of glass, light, and text, I feel a peculiar sense of curiosity. The display invites me to reflect on the nature of research and development, the ceaseless human striving for understanding. The tilted perspective adds to my sense of displacement, as though I am both observer and participant in an ongoing experiment. Awareness sharpens—I am within a space that both contains and reveals the curiosity I bring.
